The '''Hyallp''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] race of [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] beings. They were multi-legged arthropods. Little was known of their [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of origin or culture. [[Noy Waglla]] was a Hyallp.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->{{CSWECite|III||Waglla, Noy}}
